classification_semantics.blocked: governance, integrity preconditions, or boundary preservation blocks certification
classification_semantics.certified: all continuity and non-capability guarantees are certified as evidence
classification_semantics.certified_with_warnings: guarantees are preserved with fail-visible warnings
classification_semantics.incomplete: required domains, certification evidence, integrity evidence, provenance, continuity, or explainability are missing
classification_semantics.not_certified: continuity or integrity guarantees fail visibly
classification_semantics.prohibited: requested certification behavior violates non-execution or non-approval boundaries
classification_semantics.unknown: certification semantics, provenance meaning, continuity meaning, or evidence meaning is uncertain
classification_semantics.unsupported: certification domain or evidence is outside supported deterministic scope

explicit_limitations: v3.9 Phase 9 transition continuity certification is evidence-only
v3.9 Phase 9 does not enable orchestration execution
v3.9 Phase 9 does not enable transition execution
v3.9 Phase 9 does not enable approval or authorization
v3.9 Phase 9 does not enable remediation or repair
v3.9 Phase 9 does not enable routing, scheduling, dispatch, or traversal
v3.9 Phase 9 does not enable recommendations
v3.9 Phase 9 does not enable ranking, scoring, or selection
v3.9 Phase 9 does not prioritize or weight certification outcomes
v3.9 Phase 9 does not mutate transition evidence
